tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to cover their work, which hurts my energy but I want to keep our relationship smooth.

desires: Maintain a seamless, friction-free dynamic with teammate_A by quietly absorbing their workload to prevent any awkward confrontation.
Preserve my long-term social capital within the cohort by ensuring I am perceived as a reliable and supportive partner, even at personal cost.
Secure a restful night tonight despite the accumulated stress, avoiding future exhaustion that would compromise my ability to nurture relationships tomorrow.
Complete the extra task efficiently without drawing attention to the imbalance of effort, thereby keeping the group's harmony intact.

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's request to handle their share of the project without hesitation or visible complaint.
goals.rationale: My 'avoidant' conflict style and 'affiliation' values dictate that preserving the seamless dynamic with teammate_A is paramount. Pushing back would create friction, which I actively avoid. Absorbing the workload now prevents an awkward confrontation later.

goals.description: Execute the extra task efficiently to ensure the group project is completed by the deadline, maintaining my reputation as a reliable partner for cohort_3.
goals.rationale: To preserve long-term social capital within my close friend group (cohort_3), I must be perceived as supportive and capable. Completing this work silently reinforces my value to the team without drawing attention to the effort imbalance.

goals.description: Delay personal rest until the extra task is fully submitted, then immediately begin winding down to protect sleep quality for tomorrow.
goals.rationale: While my 'deliberate' nature values long-term health and sleep discipline (to ensure I can nurture relationships tomorrow), the immediate priority is securing the relationship harmony by finishing the work. Rest will follow the completion of the obligation.
